title: AttireCraft
description: Some clothing items, and they can be nested
body:
Adds shirts, blazers and trousers in 16 Minecraft colors, and a neck tie (I'm too lazy to add all colors of them...).

Shirts can be placed "inside" blazers similar to vanilla bundles, and neck ties can be added to either shirts or blazers. Only one item of "category" can be nested at the same time.

Made for Modfest 26: Animation, Affection, Academia
